title: External payment provider outage cascades to checkout
summary: The external payment provider (stripe) starts returning 503s and timeouts at 13:00 due to a provider-side outage. checkout's charge calls fail and api-gateway surfaces 5xx to users. Our own services are healthy apart from the failing external call. The cause is outside our control: an external dependency outage.
question: Why did checkout payments start failing at 13:00 on 2026-06-17?

ground_truth.notes: All errors live on the external stripe call span; checkout's own internal work is healthy and there is no internal deploy or config change. Evidence must identify the external dependency and rule out internal causes.
